# GitHub Profile Maker - AI Crawler Documentation

## Overview

GitHub Profile Maker (https://github-profile-maker.vercel.app) is a free, no-signup web application that enables users to create stunning GitHub profile READMEs using an intuitive visual drag-and-drop builder.

## Purpose

This tool allows developers to design custom GitHub profile READMEs without writing any code. Users can select from 25+ customizable blocks, configure colors and styles, preview their design in real-time, and export the result as Markdown ready to paste into their GitHub profile.

## Target Audience

- Software developers wanting to enhance their GitHub presence
- Tech recruiters evaluating candidate profiles
- Open source maintainers showcasing their projects
- Students building their developer portfolio
- Anyone wanting a professional-looking GitHub profile

## Features

### Core Functionality
- Visual drag-and-drop editor with real-time preview
- 25+ customizable blocks including:
  - Activity Graph
  - Stats Cards (streak, top languages, wakatime)
  - Trophy showcase
  - Skill icons
  - Social badges
  - Image and GIF support
  - Animated typing effects
  - Quote blocks
  - Dividers and spacers
  - Custom headers and banners
  - Collapsible sections
  - Visitor counters
- Dark and light theme support
- Custom color options with gradient support
- Pre-built templates for quick starts
- Auto-save functionality
- Profile quality checker
- Export to GitHub Gist
- Share URL generation

### Technical Details
- Built with Next.js 14+ (App Router)
- Client-side rendering for interactive builder
- Server-side rendering for SEO content
- TypeScript throughout
- Responsive design (mobile, tablet, desktop)
- Progressive Web App capable

## Content Structure

### Main Page Sections (for SEO)
1. **Header**: Logo, navigation, action buttons
2. **Builder Canvas**: Interactive drag-and-drop workspace
3. **Block Sidebar**: Available blocks to add
4. **Configuration Panel**: Block-specific settings
5. **Preview Panel**: Real-time markdown preview
6. **Footer**: Links to feedback, support

### SEO Content Keywords
GitHub profile maker, GitHub README builder, create GitHub profile, custom GitHub README, GitHub profile generator, markdown profile, GitHub profile template, visual README editor, developer profile, portfolio builder

## User Journey

1. **Landing**: User arrives at the tool
2. **Username Entry**: User enters their GitHub username
3. **Block Selection**: User browses and selects blocks from sidebar
4. **Block Configuration**: User customizes each block's content and style
5. **Preview**: User views real-time Markdown preview
6. **Export**: User downloads or saves their README
7. **GitHub Update**: User pastes content to their profile

## File Types

- **HTML**: Main application pages
- **JSON**: API endpoints for GitHub data, templates, themes
- **Sitemap**: XML sitemap for search engines
- **Robots**: Crawler directives

- GitHub Repository: https://github.com/zntb/github-profile-maker
- Issues/Feedback: https://github.com/zntb/github-profile-maker/issues
- Support: https://buymeacoffee.com/codetibo
